ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "eval_set" TEXT /* Evaluation set for model training (e.g., prior, train, test) */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the order for a specific user */,
  "order_dow" INTEGER /* Day of the week the order was placed (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday) */,
  "order_hour_of_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the order was placed (0-23) */,
  "days_since_prior_order" REAL /* Number of days since the user's prior order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary address */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., new, returning, VIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "average_days_between_orders" REAL /* Average number of days between orders */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the user */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed by the user */,
  "churn_risk" REAL /* Risk of the user churning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_frequency_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product popularity analysis */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders for the product */,
  "average_quantity_per_order" REAL /* Average quantity ordered per order */,
  "last_ordered_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last ordered */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_popularity_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category */,
  "preferred_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred product */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the user's preference */,
  "last_preference_update" TEXT /* Date when the user's preferences were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "predicted_order_date" TEXT /* Predicted date of the next order */,
  "predicted_products" TEXT /* Predicted products in the next order */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_total_amount" REAL /* Predicted total amount of the next order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age group, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign response */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., clicked, purchased) */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value of the response (e.g., purchase amount) */,
  "response_source" TEXT /* Source of the response (e.g., email, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse storing the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., FedEx, UPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user returning the order */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "handling_fee" REAL /* Handling fee charged for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
